name: Voice Assistant
description: ESPHome devices with a microphone are able to stream the audio to Home Assistant and be processed there by [assist](https://www.home-assistant.io/voice_control/).

config_entries.label: Media Player
config_entries.description: The [media_player](https://esphome.io/components/media_player/) to use to output the response. Cannot be used with `speaker` above.

config_entries.label: Micro Wake Word
config_entries.description: The [micro_wake_word](https://esphome.io/components/micro_wake_word/) component used for wake word detection. Configuring this allows Home Assistant to change which wake word model is enabled.

config_entries.label: Speaker
config_entries.description: The [speaker](https://esphome.io/components/speaker/) to use to output the response. Cannot be used with `media_player` below.

config_entries.label: Auto Gain
config_entries.description: Auto gain level to apply to the assist pipeline. Between 0dBFS and 31dBFS inclusive. Defaults to 0 (disabled).

config_entries.label: Conversation Timeout
config_entries.description: How long to wait before resetting the `conversation_id` sent to the voice assist pipeline, which contains the context of the current assist pipeline. Defaults to `300s`.

config_entries.label: Microphone
config_entries.description: The [microphone](https://esphome.io/components/microphone/) settings to use for input. A single source may be provided directly, or up to two sources may be provided as a list. When two sources are configured, audio from both is streamed to Home Assistant; see [Second microphone channel](https://esphome.io/components/voice_assistant#second-microphone-channel) below.

config_entries.label: Noise Suppression Level
config_entries.description: The noise suppression level to apply to the assist pipeline. Between 0 and 4 inclusive. Defaults to 0 (disabled).

config_entries.label: Use Wake Word
config_entries.description: Enable wake word on the assist pipeline. Defaults to `false`.

config_entries.label: Volume Multiplier
config_entries.description: Volume multiplier to apply to the assist pipeline. Must be larger than 0. Defaults to 1 (disabled).
